label: Shuttered Berth
description: Shuttered Berth functions as a compact sleeping chamber partitioned from The Glareward Canteen by insulated bulkhead panels that preserve the station’s strict air discipline. Ribbed hull plating remains exposed under a low amber striplight filtered through narrow light-baffles, keeping the space in the canteen’s glare-tempered palette. A wall-bolted bunk and fold-down desk sit beneath a gasketed locker face, their edges rounded to match orbital safety standards. A small acoustic grille and odor-trap vent tie the room into the Anchorage’s sealed circulation without admitting concourse noise or cargo tang.
